props.name: enableRainbow
props.description: Enables rainbow color cycling animation for the grid.

props.name: gridColor
props.description: Color of the grid when rainbow mode is disabled.

props.name: rippleIntensity
props.description: Controls the intensity of the ripple effect from the center.

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Controls the density/size of the grid pattern.

props.name: gridThickness
props.description: Controls the thickness of the grid lines.

props.name: fadeDistance
props.description: Controls how far the fade effect extends from the center.

props.name: vignetteStrength
props.description: Controls the intensity of the vignette (edge darkening) effect.

props.name: glowIntensity
props.description: Adds a glow effect to the grid lines.

props.name: opacity
props.description: Overall opacity of the entire effect.

props.name: gridRotation
props.description: Rotate the entire grid pattern by degrees.

props.name: mouseInteraction
props.description: Enable mouse/touch interaction to create ripples.

props.name: mouseInteractionRadius
props.description: Controls the radius of the mouse interaction effect.
